CustomField.description: Key + value, separated by '::' between the key and the value and by ',,' between the key + value pair. For example: key1::value1,,key1::value2,,key2::value3
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Key + value, separated by '::' between the key and the value and by ',,' between the key + value pair. For example: key1::value1,,key1::value2,,key2::value3
CustomField.label: Header
